subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of Providence! Though the Persians have traversed the wilderness of abasement and degradation for thirteen hundred years [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه یزدان فارسیان هر چند هزار و سیصد سال بادیه ذلت و هوان پیمودند
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
